characters.appearance: Animated female character with large green eyes, fair skin, and wavy red hair. She has a stylized, cartoonish look.
characters.wardrobe: White t-shirt, small gold hoop earrings with a crescent moon charm.

characters.appearance: Young adult male with dark hair, a short beard, and a mustache. He has a relaxed, casual appearance.
characters.demeanor: Sleepy, relaxed, but engaged in the conversation.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: Yes, I know English. [Yes, I know English.]
Character A says: Technically it's correct, but native speakers simply say, I speak English. [Technically it's correct, but native speakers simply say, I speak English.]
Character B says: I speak English. [I speak English.]
Character A says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character B says: I am twenty-four. [I am twenty-four.]
Character A says: You mean, I am twenty-four years old. [You mean, I am twenty-four years old.]
Character B says: I am twenty-four years old. [I am twenty-four years old.]
Character A says: What is your name? [What is your name?]
Character B says: My name is Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Native speakers normally say, I'm Gustavo. [Native speakers normally say, I'm Gustavo.]
Character B says: I'm Gustavo. [I'm Gustavo.]
Character A says: बहुत बढ़िया! [Well done!]
Character B says: Thanks, but who are you? [Thanks, but who are you?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर आपकी AI tutor हूँ। हम रोज़ ऐसे ही बात करके English सीख सकते हैं। [I am your AI tutor on Supernova. We can talk like this every day to learn English.]
Character B says: पर मेरी English तो बहुत basic है। मुझे बोलने में डर लगता है। [But my English is very basic. I am afraid to speak.]
Character A says: कोई बात नहीं! मैं आपको हिंदी में समझा कर English बोलना सिखा सकती हूँ। [No problem! I can explain in Hindi and teach you to speak English.]
Character B says: आपको हिंदी भी आती है? [You know Hindi too?]
Character A says: बिलकुल, मैं एक AI हूँ। [Of course, I am an AI.]
Character B says: मैं अभी Supernova app download करता हूँ। [I will download the Supernova app right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core feature: conversational AI practice.
- Demonstrates real-time correction of common mistakes.
- Highlights the Hindi-to-English learning approach.
- Ends with a strong call to action.

- Displays the Supernova logo and app store badges.
- Provides a clear final call to action.
